creator: pwd@punky.snu.ac.kr
text:
Sorry, previous mail is my fault...(it should go ports/6053...)

for mizifont ports, add this patch...

--- ../../mizifont/pkg/MESSAGE     Tue Mar 17 20:33:29 1998
+++ MESSAGE     Fri Mar 20 09:52:25 1998
@@ -3,7 +3,6 @@
 
 1. This package should not be commercial use.
 2. This package should not be redistributed(except FreeBSD mirrors).
-3. This package is designed for Linux, so use it at your own risk.
 
 For more information, contact to info@mizi.co.kr or
http://www.mizi.co.kr
